debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_3
inst✝² : AddCommGroup V
inst✝¹ : Module ℚ V
inst✝ : FiniteDimensional ℚ V
φ : V ≃ₗ[ℚ] V
⊢ ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
    Set.BijOn
      ⇑((fun v =>
            ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv
              (@Aux.continuousBaseChange V inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.commRing (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v)))
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.instAlgebraAdicCompletion (RingOfIntegers ℚ) ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.uniformSpace
                    (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v))).toTopologicalSpace
                ⋯ φ))
          v)
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range

by
      have : φ.det ≠ 0 := LinearEquiv.det_ne_zero φ
      have : {v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ) | v.valuation ℚ φ.det ≠ 1}.Finite := by
        apply Set.Finite.subset (NumberField.finite_setOf_valuation_ne_one _ this)
        intro v hv
        exact hv
      filter_upwards [this.compl_mem_cofinite]
      intro v hv
      simp_all [Set.BijOn, Function.Bijective]

For details, see: https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/error-code#token-limit (request_id: b047ea30-3f3e-4b7b-8928-7006912f62d8)', 'param': None, 'type': 'server_error'}}

have : φ.det ≠ 0 := LinearEquiv.det_ne_zero φ
    have : {v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (𝓞 ℚ) | v.valuation ℚ φ.det ≠ 1}.Finite := by
      apply Set.Finite.subset (NumberField.finiteSetOfNontrivialValuations ℚ φ.det this)
      intro v hv
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hv ⊢
      contrapose! hv
      rw [hv]
      norm_num
    filter_upwards [this.compl_mem_cofinite]
    intro v hv
    simp only [Set.mem_compl_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hv
    rw [← hv]
    have : (Aux.continuousBaseChange (v.adicCompletion ℚ) φ).toContinuousAddEquiv =
      ContinuousLinearEquiv.baseChange ℚ (v.adicCompletion ℚ) V V φ := rfl
    simp_rw [this]
    apply Set.BijOn.of_inv
    · exact (Aux.c_v V v).toContinuousAddEquiv.symm.toHomeomorph.toEquiv.bijOn_image _ _
    · exact (Aux.c_v V v).toContinuousAddEquiv.toHomeomorph.toEquiv.bijOn_image _ _

have : φ.det ≠ 0 := LinearEquiv.det_ne_zero φ
    have : ∀ᶠ v in Filter.cofinite, IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v φ.det = 1 := by
      apply IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.eventually_eq_one_of_ne_zero
      exact this
    filter_upwards [this] with v hv
    simp_all [Set.BijOn, Function.Bijective]
    <;> aesop
